fields.helpText: Pointer to the clinical expression in the Expression file (#757.01) which  represents the preferred term for the Major Concept.
This field is intended to provide applications the ability to group terms by categories, such as Cardiovascular, Pulmonary, etc.
This field is for future use.  It is intended to provide applications the ability to group terms by clinical category (not provided by UMLS), such as cardiovascular, pulmonary etc.
